text: Moving through this sleek, quiet space, I feel a sense of anticipation. The architecture is modern and minimal, amplifying the silence. Now, I stand before an exhibit filled with ideas and innovation—colorful, vibrant, and intellectually alive. The "R+D" sign fills me with curiosity; I am surrounded by human ingenuity and the dialogue between humanity and technology. There’s an energy here, a pulse. I feel both small and inspired, aware of my place in an ongoing story of progress.
